summary_one_line: Well-formed SQL with relational/arithmetic operator tokens that drive the GetToken scanner true-branch at line 159496.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Input must be syntactically valid SQL (a SELECT statement) whose expression contains relational/arithmetic comparison operators (>=, <=, =, -, /) so that sqlite3GetToken classifies a character into the token class whose true branch at 159496 fires and the parser proceeds into expression evaluation.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: The value_profile winner-resolving seed is clean SQL 'SELECT 11-013>=1...' packed with comparison/arithmetic operators (>=, <=, =, -, /); these operands feed integer-CMP callbacks whose CMP_MAP distance buckets give value_profile a coverage gradient toward valid token-producing inputs, so it resolves 9/10 trials.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: naive's loser-blocking seeds are malformed byte soup (e.g. '<.      ;.I/;;;.' and runs of 0c/cb/df bytes) lacking a coherent SELECT/operator structure; with only edge-counter feedback and no CMP gradient, naive blocks 8/10 and reaches the branch true side far less (avg hitcount winner=3 vs loser=31 on the false side).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile intercepts integer CMPs and writes a (PC, operand-distance) bucket into CMP_MAP; an input whose comparison operands are closer to matching adds a new bucket and is kept as corpus, giving a similarity gradient that steers toward the structured SQL+operator inputs that drive the GetToken true branch. naive has no such CMP feedback. Mechanism = CMP_MAP gradient.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the true branch of a token-scanner test in sqlite3GetToken at line 159496, globally blocked on the true side.
Globally blocked side is the true branch.
The decisive pair is value_profile beating naive with technique delta value_profile.
value_profile resolves 9/10 while naive resolves only 2/10.
The winner-resolving seed is well-formed SQL containing relational and arithmetic operators.
The winner seed continues with comparison and arithmetic operators (<=, =, -, /).
The loser-blocking naive seed is malformed non-SQL byte soup.
value_profile adds integer-CMP interception writing operand-distance buckets into CMP_MAP, a coverage gradient naive lacks.

each CMP callback writes into a `CMP_MAP` keyed by (PC, operand-distance
bucket)

evidence_trail.claim: An input producing a CMP-operand pair closer to matching adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus, the gradient that steers value_profile.

An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: claimed_mechanism is CMP_MAP gradient (value_profile), not I2SRandReplace, so the mandatory lineage/dash-row check does not apply; verification rests on the source-side comparison structure plus the explicit value_profile MECHANISM CONTEXT, no db_query.py lineage was required or run.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness where the token-scanner true branch is gated on a structure with NO interceptable integer/string CMP near it shows value_profile resolving no faster than naive, indicating CMP_MAP gradient is not the driver.

weakest_evidence_point: The causal link from the comparison operators in the winning SQL to a specific CMP_MAP-buckable integer comparison gating line 159496 is inferred from operator presence and downstream resolveExprStep/VdbeExec comparison arms, not directly traced to the branch test itself.
